## Major Release 5.0: A New World

This is a major update focusing on customization, quick setup, templates, and advanced world-building features.

### New & Improved
- **YAML Remapper**: Tie an existing/legacy project into Radial Timeline's base metadata keys.
- **Advanced YAML editor**: Customize the Advanced YAML template in settings by adding, deleting keys to fit your current system. Then create a new note with this template using the Command `Create advanced note`. Or via Book designer.
- **Story Beat Editor**: Define custom beat systems in settings. Name beats, assign to acts, drag to reorder. Color-coded rows show sync status (green = aligned, orange = needs merge, red = duplicate). Create generates template notes; Merge realigns existing files after changes.
- **Alien Planet Calendar**:  Track the time in faraway (inter-planetary) time zones. View it using ALT sub-mode in Chronologue Mode.
- **Act Structure Customization**: Now you can have 5 Acts or 7 or more with custom names via Settings customization.
- **Book Designer**: The new modal (accessible from the new Welcome Screen or Command Palette) will let you setup a new story scaffold quickly with mini preview-timeline. Use basic or advance yaml, adjust time increment, set the Acts and  more.
- **New Welcome Screen**: A redesigned welcome screen for new projects (no scenes), featuring better orientation and direct links to resources and the Book Designer button.

###  Enhanced & Bugs
- **Restyled Modals**: Every single modal in the plugin has been harmonized with a consistent, polished design.
- **Local LLM**: More options and better integration for working with local AI models. Still a work in progress.
- **Chronologue Backdrop Styling**: Updated styles for Alt and Shift backdrop interactions ([8d627a1](https://github.com/EricRhysTaylor/Radial-Timeline/commit/8d627a1c2f4d5950b386e7decb358a7aabbac3e0)).
- **Backdrop Time Alignment**: Now correctly aligns with corresponding scene time indexes in outer ring ([73e0cc0](https://github.com/EricRhysTaylor/Radial-Timeline/commit/73e0cc0f57d623e8efd686dc4a6491690b0639c1)).
- **Tooltips**: New tooltip styling using Obsidian bubbles ([b21e870](https://github.com/EricRhysTaylor/Radial-Timeline/commit/b21e87031ea519db8618a7a1071a8762a8b677c6)).
